# MusicTube Project - Copilot Instructions

This is a complete Android music player application built with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose.

## Project Overview
- **Type**: Android Application (Kotlin + Jetpack Compose)
- **Architecture**: MVVM with Hilt dependency injection
- **Database**: Room for local data storage
- **Audio**: ExoPlayer for media playback
- **UI**: Material Design with Jetpack Compose

## Project Status: ✅ COMPLETE
- [x] Project structure created
- [x] Android manifest and permissions configured
- [x] Database models and DAOs implemented
- [x] UI screens and components built
- [x] ViewModels and repositories created
- [x] Music player service implemented
- [x] Search functionality (mock implementation)
- [x] Resource files and themes configured
- [x] Documentation completed

## Development Guidelines
- Follow MVVM architecture pattern
- Use Hilt for dependency injection
- Implement UI with Jetpack Compose
- Follow Material Design principles
- Keep music player functionality in background service
- Use coroutines and Flow for async operations

## Next Steps for Enhancement
1. Integrate real music search API (YouTube Data API)
2. Implement audio download functionality
3. Add playlist management features
4. Create audio equalizer
5. Add lyrics display support
6. Implement music widgets
